results.title: GitNexus-style structural graph canvas
results.content: Refactored dashboard graph canvases to feel closer to GitNexus by adding repository/folder/file context nodes, hierarchy-aware placement, GitNexus-inspired node size/color mapping, relation-styled edges, and larger structural graph canvases for both search and impact views. Files: src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, docs/progress/architecture-transition-cli-edge-sync.md

results.title: Graph explorer filters and symbol history heuristics
results.content: Added graph search filters for language and last_state, made graph query scoring match git history metadata, added canvas cues for node state/history freshness, and enriched RepoScanner nodes with symbol/line-level git last-touch heuristics from blame while preserving file-level history context. Files: src/minder/tools/repo_scanner.py, src/minder/tools/graph.py, src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py, src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts, tests/unit/test_ingest.py, tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, docs/progress/architecture-transition-cli-edge-sync.md

results.title: Delete-aware CLI graph sync tombstones
results.content: Extended graph sync to carry deleted_files through src/minder/cli.py, src/minder/tools/repo_scanner.py, and src/minder/application/admin/dto.py. AdminConsoleUseCases.sync_repository_graph now prunes repo-scoped graph nodes whose metadata.path matches deleted files using IGraphRepository.list_nodes and KnowledgeGraphStore.list_nodes. Added integration coverage in tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py and updated progress docs.

results.title: Graph node git state metadata
results.content: Enriched RepoScanner file-scoped node metadata with language, last_state, last_commit summary/timestamp, history_summary, and recent_commits; dashboard node details now render these fields without changing graph storage schema. Files: src/minder/tools/repo_scanner.py, tests/unit/test_ingest.py, src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts, docs/progress/architecture-transition-cli-edge-sync.md

results.title: MCP graph search and symbol inventory
results.content: Continued the Phase 3 transition by adding a repo-scoped minder_search_graph MCP tool backed by graph node metadata matching, plus the minder://repos/{repo_name}/symbols resource. The transport enforces repo_scope for this tool the same way it does for other repo-path MCP tools. Updated transition docs and validated with focused pytest, ruff, and mypy.
